title: Site Brief
description: Phase 1 Understand artefact: structured business/site brief produced by briefModel (or its mock fallback). Locked by ADR 0013 before Sprint 2B wires planningModel.

runId.description: Engine Run identifier the brief belongs to.

rawPrompt.description: The original prompt as briefModel saw it. May include language hint preamble.

businessTypeGuess.description: Short slug describing the business (e.g. 'electrician', 'photo-studio'). Null when ambiguous.

companyName.description: Company or brand name if explicitly mentioned in the prompt. Null when absent.

pageCount.description: Number of pages briefModel inferred. Null when not derivable.

targetAudience.description: Who the site is meant to convert.

requestedCapabilities.description: Capability slugs the user explicitly asked for (e.g. 'contact-form', 'reviews'). Lookup target for capability-map.v1.

locationHint.description: City or region if mentioned. Free-form string, may include country.

contactPhone.description: Phone number if explicitly mentioned in the prompt. Null when absent.

contactEmail.description: Email address if explicitly mentioned in the prompt. Null when absent.

contactAddress.description: Street/postal address if explicitly mentioned in the prompt. Null when absent.

contentDepth.description: How detailed the copy should feel.

sourceModelRole.description: Locked: this artefact is always written by the briefModel role.

modelUsed.description: Concrete model identifier (e.g. 'gpt-5.4') or 'mock' when fallback ran.

briefSource.description: Truth field about which code path produced this brief. Never claims 'real' when fallback ran.

briefError.description: Error message when briefSource indicates a fallback path. Null on success or no-key path.

attemptedModel.description: Model that was attempted before LLM-error fallback. Null when no LLM call was attempted.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the brief was written.

scaffoldHint.description: Optional scaffold suggestion the builder attaches when running from a Project Input. Not produced by dev_generate.py.
